sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 16:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 16:1
items.html: Because there is light of Ozen in Keter, too, since there is the phase of male there, who has phase two of clothing. (Inner Light, Item 26)
